criteria: 1M+ views (plays or views); a REAL person in an interview/podcast/keynote/conference talking about AI (its value, risks, disruption, or their own adoption) in ANY industry — the speaker need NOT be an AI or tech figure, any well-known speaker in any field counts; NOT already posted on @theaibolt (dedup by speaker+topic vs full history); duration preferred 30-90s but longer viral clips OK (cut at edit); recent preferred but evergreen older 1M+ clips accepted (age flagged). EXCLUDE AI-generated/CGI video, memes, faceless voiceover, text-overlay news, no-speaker demos.
status: 2026-07-22: @theaibolt posted_urls sweep (200-limit, 142 items) found ZERO new posts vs prior sweep (143/143 URLs unchanged) - no pruning needed. Today's 22 pre-seeded clips (airesearches/evolving.ai/thewizeai/theaipage) were reviewed and REJECTED wholesale: all are AI-generated/CGI video with no real speaker (speaker field empty on every one), failing the hard FORMAT gate - do not promote them in future runs either. Ran the two untried levers from 2026-07-09 status: (a) X/Twitter search via api-ninja/x-twitter-advanced-search - worked, 4 candidates; (b) direct speaker-name + cross-industry IG keyword search via data-slayer/instagram-search-reels - worked, 11 candidates across Tier2/3 researchers and cross-industry figures. Net: +9 available (Palmer Luckey x2, Tristan Harris, Geoffrey Hinton 60-Minutes, Daniel Kokotajlo, Mo Gawdat x2, Ben Affleck, Jensen Huang), +5 review (short-duration or unconfirmed-source clips), +1 view-count refresh (Grantham). Pillar mix this batch skewed Controversial (safety/warning stories were the highest-yield); future runs should target more Educational/Inspirational sourcing to rebalance. Still far from 90/100 threshold - IG keyword search on individual speakers mostly yields sub-1M aggregator reposts; X/Twitter search is the most promising underused lever going forward, worth deeper investment (more query variations, engagement-metric tuning) in future runs. Priority-1 lever (mining full source interviews behind all 143 theaibolt posts) NOT attempted this run - scope too large for one session, flagged as a candidate for a dedicated future run.
